mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nursing_elder WHERE check_in_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nursing_bed WHERE bed_status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nursing_reservation WHERE status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nursing_alert_data WHERE status = 0

SELECT DATE(reservation_date) AS stat_date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM nursing_reservation WHERE reservation_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND CURDATE() GROUP BY DATE(reservation_date) ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT DATE(create_time) AS stat_date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM nursing_check_in WHERE create_time BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND CURDATE() AND status = 2 GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY stat_date
SELECT CASE bed_status WHEN 0 THEN '空闲' WHEN 1 THEN '已入住' WHEN 2 THEN '维修中' WHEN 3 THEN '预订' ELSE '未知' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM nursing_bed GROUP BY bed_status ORDER BY bed_status

SELECT f.name AS name, COUNT(e.id) AS value FROM nursing_floor f LEFT JOIN nursing_room r ON f.id = r.floor_id AND r.status = 1 LEFT JOIN nursing_bed b ON r.id = b.room_id AND b.bed_status = 1 LEFT JOIN nursing_elder e ON b.id = e.bed_id AND e.check_in_status = 1 WHERE f.status = 1 GROUP BY f.id, f.name ORDER BY f.floor_no
SELECT l.level_name AS name, COUNT(e.id) AS value FROM nursing_elder e LEFT JOIN nursing_level l ON e.level_id = l.id WHERE e.check_in_status = 1 GROUP BY l.id, l.level_name ORDER BY l.sort_order
